ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title */,
  "job_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job location */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the job is publicly visible */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department posting the job */,
  "posted_date" TEXT /* Date the job was posted */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for applying to the job */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job responsibilities and requirements */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Range of the salary for the job */,
  "experience_required" TEXT /* Minimum years of experience required */,
  "education_required" TEXT /* Minimum educational qualification required */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* List of benefits provided with the job */,
  "hiring_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hiring manager responsible for the job posting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_hiring_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("hiring_manager_id") REFERENCES hiring_managers ("hiring_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_job_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_location_id") REFERENCES job_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department's responsibilities and functions */,
  "department_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary location of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_department_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_location_id") REFERENCES job_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job title */,
  "job_category" TEXT /* Category of the job (e.g., technical, administrative, sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being applied for */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "resume" TEXT /* Path to the applicant's resume */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* Path to the applicant's cover letter */,
  "application_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current status of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_application_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_status_id") REFERENCES application_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "resume" TEXT /* Path to the applicant's resume */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* Path to the applicant's cover letter */,
  "linkedin_profile" TEXT /* URL to the applicant's LinkedIn profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application status */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job application */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, rejected, accepted) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the application status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_status_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES job_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hiring_managers" (
  "hiring_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hiring manager */,
  "hiring_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the hiring manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the hiring manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the hiring manager */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the hiring manager belongs to */,
  "manager_since" TEXT /* Date the hiring manager started their role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hiring_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hiring_managers_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_posting_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting status */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job posting (e.g., open, closed, draft) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change (e.g., filled, closed due to budget cuts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_posting_status_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job application */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., deadline approaching, application received) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Detailed message content of the notification */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES job_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., views, applications, deadline) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* JSON object containing detailed report data */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, job posting, application submission) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
